Everything you need to scale.

Powerful tools built into one unified platform to help you manage inventory, serve patients faster, and track your growth.

Smart Inventory

Automated stock monitoring with intelligent reorder triggers and expiry prediction to prevent waste and shortages.

Prescription Portal

Secure tracking of medical prescriptions with instant stock verification, patient history, and automated dispensing workflows.

Advanced Analytics

High-performance data engine providing real-time sales, turnover visualizations, and actionable financial insights.
